title: Adamantite
description: Adamantite/Titanium ore that generates after defeating the Ender Dragon.
body:
# About

After the Ender Dragon is defeated, **either Adamantite or Titanium** is selected based on the world seed, and that ore generates in old and new chunks in the overworld at heights -60 to -30 in deepslate.

Smelt the ore into ingots to upgrade netherite tools/armor into **Adamantite or Titanium** tools/armor, requiring an upgrade template. If [Ranged Weapon API](https://modrinth.com/mod/ranged-weapon-api) is installed, an Adamantite or Titanium **Crossbow** can also be crafted.

The **Adamantite Upgrade Template** can be found in End City chests, the **Titanium Upgrade Template** in Ancient Cities.

Both the Ingots and the Upgrade Templates *can be interchanged* with a Chorus Fruit.

# Configuration

Can be found at `config/adamantite.cfg`. The values only affect ore generation. Default configuration:

```
enableGeneration = true
interval = 220
triesPerChunk = 2
minHeight = -60
maxHeight = -30
```
